summary: A heartfelt personal reflection mentioning Brent Mydland and a few song titles, but offering no concrete details on recording or performance quality.
review: The reviewer shares an emotional recollection of seeing Brent's red‑eyed stare during the set closer and weaves a poetic tribute to love and history. No specific comments are made about the audio source, clarity, or the musical execution of the concert, leaving both recording and show quality indeterminate.
